description: Case style: Stainless steel square case Dial style: Silver dial with white, silver and red hands Strap style: Black textured rubber strap with a tang clasp Features: Day aperture on the 6 hour mark, Ssteele branding at the 12 hour mark, Maxima branding on the 6 hour mark, screw to reset time Waterproof to 3 ATM, allowing you to wear it even when showering Warranty: 1 year
